title: Origins: Voidcrowned
description: A combat-oriented Origin with many tricks up its sleeve, able to disorient foes with hallucinations and teleports.
body:
# 《💜 Voidcrowned 👑》

**Impact: 3**

『 _A glitch. An anomaly. An exception. The Void Star bestows you with powers beyond the mundane._ 』

A trickster Origin with multiple powers to deceive enemies. _Intended to be overpowered with its infinite respawn._

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

〚 ⭐ 〛Void Star

_"I-I-I could totally beat you in Hoplite."_

> You glitch back into reality on death, respawning within 30 blocks.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

〚 🎭 〛Breaking Reality

_"SI-I-IIKEE!!"_

> Your abilities unravel foes' minds at the seams, inflicting **🎭 Hallucination** for 10 seconds, with varied effects:
> 
> - Tier 1: Random mob sounds play behind.
> 
> - Tier 2: The afflicted's vision is limited with Darkness.
> 
> - Tier 3: Summon a clone (zombie) to chase the victim.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 👁️ 〛Observant** `[Sneak+Primary]`

_"%!@#%, dead or alive, is m-m-min-e-e-"_

> You can reveal every hostile mob/player within 64 blocks, becoming able to teleport to them. Upon teleporting, the target gain **🎭 Hallucination III (10s)**

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 🌀 〛Nova** `[Primary]`
_"C'M-'M-E-ERE BOY!"_

> You can throw a void star forward after a windup, teleporting the first entity hit, freezing its movement and inflicting **🎭 Hallucination I (10s)**.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 🌌 〛Void Rush** `[Secondary]`

_"Do you act-t-tu-ually think that you can defe-e-e-eat me?"_

> You can enter a _Charging_ state, highly accelerating you and increasing your next attack's damage.
>
> Landing a hit while _Charged_ allows you to recast this ability, dealing +16 damage on your next hit and inflicting **🎭 Hallucination II (10s)**, once per _Void Rush_ cast.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

〚 💜 〛Instability
_"AHAHA, ARE YOU KIDDING? I HATE THIS STUPID JOB!"_

> Your form is made unstable by countless glitches. Your **Instability** rises over time, only receding when you slay hostile entities/players.
